loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing current THD and voltage deviation as proxies for harmonic distortion and flicker/crest factors, as dedicated voltage harmonic and waveform shape columns are not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing current THD trends — voltage THD and harmonic order (H5/H7) data is not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Load Impact & Transformer Stress
loop1.note: Showing Power Factor and True PF directly; PF Gap and K-factor are approximated using loadFactorPct as a proxy because exact columns are not measured for this asset.
